ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "time" REAL /* Time or period for the prediction */,
  "y_1" REAL /* Population metric Y (e.g., population count) */,
  "popPred_medianCOV" REAL /* Median population prediction with coefficient of variation */,
  "popPred" REAL /* Population prediction value */,
  "indivPred_SAEM" REAL /* Individual prediction from the SAEM model */,
  "indWRes_SAEM" REAL /* Individual residual from the SAEM model */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic location */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's methodology */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, time series) */,
  "model_category" TEXT /* Category of the model (e.g., demographic, economic) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Current version of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predictive model */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predictive model used */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population data record */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Predicted value generated by the model */,
  "residual" REAL /* Residual error associated with the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES population_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, run model) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model involved (if applicable) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used to perform the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or suggestions provided by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug, suggestion, improvement) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predictive model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog of changes made in the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predictive model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model's predictions */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model's predictions */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model's predictions */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model's predictions */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error of the model's predictions */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error of the model's predictions */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value of the model's predictions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)
